steps.title: Clear decimals and write equations in standard form
steps.content:
Multiply the first equation by 10 to clear decimals, then rearrange both equations:
$$8x + 9y = -22$$
$$3x + 4y = 18$$

steps.title: Eliminate y using multiplication
steps.content:
To cancel the $y$ terms, multiply the equations by 4 and -9 respectively:
$$32x + 36y = -88$$
$$-27x - 36y = -162$$
